Friends of the Earth Netherlands vs. Shell

Filed25 January 2011
CompanyRoyal Dutch Shell plc
Country of operationNigeria
ComplainantMilieudefensie / Friends of the Earth Netherlands
National Contact PointDutch NCP
OutcomeFinal statement issued — partial finding against Shell

Issues alleged

  • Environmental pollution from oil spills in the Niger Delta
  • Human rights violations against Ogoni communities
  • Failure to remediate contaminated sites
